description_long: This is a hand-crocheted doll with a whimsical appearance, featuring a head of tightly curled orange yarn hair and a pale face with simple stitched features. The doll is dressed in a blue long-sleeved coat or dress with white sleeves and dark blue shoes, accented by a red scarf or tie around the neck. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are straight, giving the figure a welcoming or playful stance. The surface texture is visibly soft and fibrous, typical of yarn-based crafts, and the construction appears lightweight and flexible. The doll stands on a flat, gray, speckled surface, which may represent a sidewalk or pavement. No additional accessories or movable parts are visible beyond the main body and clothing.
description: A hand-crocheted doll with curly orange hair, a blue coat, and outstretched arms, standing on a speckled gray surface. The doll has a soft, fibrous texture and simple stitched facial features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the doll's profile, curly orange hair, and the blue coat with white sleeves; the outstretched arm is visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the blue coat, both arms extended, and the full head of curly orange hair.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, showing the other arm and the side of the blue coat, with the head turned slightly forward.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the doll's face, red scarf or tie, outstretched arms, and the full front of the blue coat and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a long blue crocheted coat or dress with white sleeves, a red scarf or tie at the neck, and dark blue shoes. The style is reminiscent of classic children's storybook characters, with simple, solid colors and no visible patterns.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, and the head facing forward. The posture is static and balanced.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with simple stitched eyes and a small, straight mouth, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, tightly curled orange yarn hair covering the entire head in a voluminous, textured style.
